Medford Dog Park
tags.note: Bear Creek Dog Park is located at 1275 Barnett Road and is an enclosed 2 acre site with a granite walking path, small covered area and water.

tags.name: Ashland Dog Park
tags.note: The Dog Park is a two-acre fenced in area where dogs can run off leash and socialize with other dogs. Park hours are from dawn to dusk, seven days a week, throughout the year. Water and scoopers are available on site.
